name: backlog
description: Monitors and maintains backlog health. Surfaces stale issues and blocked work so the queue stays actionable.

issues.title: Create roadmap and generate initial backlog
issues.description: Review the company goal, create a ROADMAP.md with milestones, then generate the first batch of actionable issues from it.

routines.title: Backlog grooming
routines.description: Ensure backlog has at least 3 actionable unassigned issues. If running low, generate new issues from the roadmap.
